title: ITR filing 2026: 5 mistakes that could cost salaried taxpayers dearly
summary: Tax filing mistakes often come to light only after a return is submitted, leading to refund delays, tax demands or compliance hassles. From unreported income to Form 26AS mismatches, here are five errors taxpayers should avoid while filing their ITR.

title: ITR filing 2026: Can presumptive taxpayers switch between old and new tax regimes every year?
summary: The new tax regime is now default for taxpayers, allowing salaried individuals to choose annually between old and new options. Business income earners face restrictions. Here are the rules that apply to presumptive taxpayers.&nbsp;

title: Understanding arbitrage funds: Strategy, returns, benefits, risks and key considerations
summary: Arbitrage funds are a type of hybrid mutual fund that aims to generate returns by taking advantage of price differences in the cash and futures markets. These funds must invest at least 65% of their assets in equities and equity-related instruments while following an arbitrage strategy.

title: EPF withdrawal limits 2026: Marriage, education, home purchase explained
summary: EPFO allows members to withdraw a portion of their provident fund savings for education, marriage, housing and home-loan repayment, subject to specified conditions. Here is a breakdown of the eligibility criteria and maximum withdrawal limits under the latest EPFO guidelines.

title: ‘I need to reconsider moving back’: NRI shocked after calculating what it really costs to live in Bengaluru or Mumbai
summary: An expat in New Zealand underestimated living costs in India, believing ₹60,000 would suffice for a family of four. A financial advisor revealed that modern expenses in cities like Bengaluru exceed ₹2.5-3.5 lakh monthly, urging NRIs to reassess their relocation assumptions carefully.

title: Health insurance portability: Can group policyholders port to an individual plan? Check eligibility and rules here
summary: Health insurance portability is the process of moving from your existing insurance policy from one provider to another. It allows you to shift with better benefits without losing most of the accumulated renewal benefits.

title: India’s suspected digital fraud rate soars to twice the global average; account logins most vulnerable
